etymology.interpretation: 點茶(點茶) (diǎn chá, "traditional tea whisking method") refers to a historical Chinese tea preparation method where tea powder is whisked in a bowl. 點(點) (diǎn, "dot; point") implies the careful, precise action of preparing tea, while 茶(茶) (chá, "tea") refers to the substance. This method was popular during the Song Dynasty and highlights the art and precision in traditional tea ceremonies.
